body.plain_text:
Hello,

*Congratulations for your graduation from ITIDA Gigs Program.*

It has been a long rewarding journey and we hope you benefited the most
from it, below you will find your signed graduation certificate, and a
suggested description for your LinkedIn post.
Post Description

   - I'm excited to share that I've officially completed the @ITIDA GIGS
   freelancing program, powered by @eyouth and initiated by @itida.

   The three month journey was so rewarding, and I managed to get my first
   gig and launch my career in freelancing after obtaining the required
   knowledge in:
   Profile setup
   Proposal writing
   Portfolio creation
   Financial management
   Negotiations and communication skills
   And marketing strategies

   Over the past few weeks, I've:
   ✅ Completed the "Freelancing 101" training
   ✅ Attended weekly webinars with expert coaches
   ✅ Attended focus sessions with niche coaches to boost my freelance career

   This program has been a great step in my freelancing journey – equipping
   me with the skills, mindset, and tools to grow professionally in the
   digital economy.
   A big thank you to the mentors, colleagues, and coordinators for the
   support and motivation along the program.
   If you're curious about freelancing and looking for your next growth
   opportunity, I highly recommend joining this program.
   Registration Link: https://landing.dfpp.eyouthlearning.com/en

   #ITIDAGigs #FreelancingJourney #DigitalSkills #RemoteWork #eyouth #MCIT
   #Egypt

*Certificate Link:*
Click Here to see your certificate
<https://drive.google.com/file/d/1Rup51xYMkSWFY4Yu6uKoKBo-xsk-dWFy/view?usp=drivesdk>

   We wish you all luck in your upcoming endeavors.

   Best Regards,
   ITIDA Gigs Management Team
body.html:
Hello,

Congratulations for your graduation from ITIDA Gigs Program.

It has been a long rewarding journey and we hope you benefited the most from it, below you will find your signed graduation certificate, and a suggested description for your LinkedIn post.

Post Description

  • I'm excited to share that I've officially completed the @ITIDA GIGS freelancing program, powered by @eyouth and initiated by @itida.

    The three month journey was so rewarding, and I managed to get my first gig and launch my career in freelancing after obtaining the required knowledge in:
    Profile setup
    Proposal writing
    Portfolio creation
    Financial management
    Negotiations and communication skills
    And marketing strategies

    Over the past few weeks, I've:
    ✅ Completed the "Freelancing 101" training
    ✅ Attended weekly webinars with expert coaches
    ✅ Attended focus sessions with niche coaches to boost my freelance career

    This program has been a great step in my freelancing journey – equipping me with the skills, mindset, and tools to grow professionally in the digital economy.
    A big thank you to the mentors, colleagues, and coordinators for the support and motivation along the program.
    If you're curious about freelancing and looking for your next growth opportunity, I highly recommend joining this program.
    Registration Link: https://landing.dfpp.eyouthlearning.com/en

    #ITIDAGigs #FreelancingJourney #DigitalSkills #RemoteWork #eyouth #MCIT #Egypt

Certificate Link:

Click Here to see your certificate

    We wish you all luck in your upcoming endeavors.

    Best Regards,
    ITIDA Gigs Management Team
